calendar.matters:
CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Set For Trial On Jul-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jasmine Martinez, plaintiff, with Margine Martinez, witness.
Jorge Martinez is sworn to interpret Spanish into English and English into Spanish.

Dennis Rose, Risk Manager, for Safeway, Inc.

Yasmine Martinez gives testimony on behalf of the plaintiff. Jorge Martinez interprets Spanish into English and English into Spanish.
Margine Martinez gives testimony on behalf of the plaintiff.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit No. 1 - Accident Report
Exhibit No. 2 - SFFD Emergency Medical Services Bill
Exhibit No. 3 - Kaiser Billing Statments and Treament log
Exhibit No. 4 - Letter from AMB Janitorial

Dennis Rose gives testimony on behalf of the defendant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the partie agree to settle the matter. The defendant, Safeway, Inc. agrees to pay to the plaintiff, Yasmine the sum $2500.00.

Judge J. Stewart; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported.

CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00
Off Calendar May-29-2009 Continued To Jul-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-29-2009 Continued To May-29-09 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 206
